definition: IEC standard code of the sub-class of a fixed class2 ceramic capacitor, as determined by the temperature characteristic of capacitance

definition_ml.en: IEC standard code of the sub-class of a fixed class2 ceramic capacitor, as determined by the temperature characteristic of capacitance

remark: First (numeric) character is always 2 (see AAE038-005). Second (alphabetic) character indicates maximum capacitance change in per cent with respect to C_R} at 20 deg C:| U_dc} = 0..........U_dc} = U_R(dc)}| B: +/-10..........+10/-15;| C: +/-20..........+20/-30;| D: +20/-30......+20/-40;| E: +20/-56......+20/-70;| F: +30/-80......+30/-90;| R: +/-15..........+15/-40;| X: +/-15..........+15/-25.|| Third (numeric) character indicates temperature range:| 1: -55/ +125 deg C;| 2: -55/ +85 deg C;| 3: -40/ +85 deg C;| 4: -25/ +85 deg C;| 6: +10/ +85 deg C.

remark_ml.en: First (numeric) character is always 2 (see AAE038-005). Second (alphabetic) character indicates maximum capacitance change in per cent with respect to C_R} at 20 deg C:| U_dc} = 0..........U_dc} = U_R(dc)}| B: +/-10..........+10/-15;| C: +/-20..........+20/-30;| D: +20/-30......+20/-40;| E: +20/-56......+20/-70;| F: +30/-80......+30/-90;| R: +/-15..........+15/-40;| X: +/-15..........+15/-25.|| Third (numeric) character indicates temperature range:| 1: -55/ +125 deg C;| 2: -55/ +85 deg C;| 3: -40/ +85 deg C;| 4: -25/ +85 deg C;| 6: +10/ +85 deg C.
